card.title: Thyroid Care
card.description: Your thyroid is a small but powerful gland that regulates metabolism, energy, mood, and overall body function by producing hormones that control how your body uses energy— impacting everything from weight and digestion to heart rate and body temperature.
card.description2: Emphasis → Get personalized thyroid care to achieve your optimal outcome for $99/mo, $297 billed quarterly.
card.finePrint: No membership required. We bill & ship quarterly and you can cancel your subscription at any time. Due to state regulations we cannot ship test...

benefits.title: Restore Energy & Metabolism
benefits.description: Boost energy levels, regulate metabolism, and improve weight management.

benefits.title: Enhance Mood
benefits.description: Helps reduce brain fog, anxiety, and mood swings.

benefits.title: Support Overall Well-Being
benefits.description: Improves hair, skin, and digestive health.

splitContent.title: Reliable care, transparent price—$99/month
splitContent.subTitle: Ongoing care is just $99/month, billed quarterly, with no membership or hidden fees. You can cancel anytime—no strings attached. This includes:
splitContent.subTitle2: We’ll send your thyroid prescriptions directly to your preferred local pharmacy, where you can use insurance or a GoodRx coupon.
